[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2022-05-01
[TITLE]: Irish Volunteers In Ukraine Face The Frontline In Their 2005 Carlow 4x4
[METADATA/INTRO]: They left their homes in Ireland, where they worked in jobs such as forklift driver, PayPal employee and GAA groundsman, to join the defence of their native country against the Russian invaders. Now, two months later, battlehardened members of the...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: They left their homes in Ireland, where they worked in jobs such as forklift driver, PayPal employee and GAA groundsman, to join the defence of their native country against the Russian invaders. 
 Now, two months later, battlehardened members of the Irish-Ukrainian platoon are just days away from a showdown with Russian forces as fully-fledged soldiers in the regular Ukrainian army. Until now they served as civilian volunteers in the fight against Vladimir Putin's army. 
 But Stanislav Lepko, a 51-year-old Irish passport holder who lived in Tallanstown, Co. Louth, for 21 years, revealed his company is in the latter stages of a registration process that will make them official members of the Ukrainian army.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: Unknown Date
[TITLE]: The Russian Jihadists Fighting for Ukraine
[METADATA/INTRO]: The role of foreign fighters has emerged at the centre of the conflict between Ukraine and Russia. Notable among the international volunteers are jihadist militants, particularly of Russian nationality, but also from former Soviet areas, who fight and propagandize[1] in...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: The role of foreign fighters has emerged at the centre of the conflict between Ukraine and Russia. Notable among the international volunteers are jihadist militants, particularly of Russian nationality, but also from former Soviet areas, who fight and propagandize[1] in other theatres of operation, such as Syria. In this instance, they have decided to take part in the conflict and exploit it as an opportunity to directly confront the “Russian enemy” with hopes of later bringing the armed confrontation back to their home regions. 
 The presence of anti-Russian foreign fighters in Ukraine is not a recent phenomenon. As early as 2015, two Chechen battalions emerged to fight on the Ukrainian front, namely the “Dzhokhar Dudayev Battalion” and the “Sheikh Mansur Battalion”.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2022-02-27
[TITLE]: It is not Kyiv's Dynamo, but a nationalist group: the football club has no relation to the photo - FIP.AM
[METADATA/INTRO]: Since the start of the Russian-initiated hostilities in Ukraine on February 24, photos have been actively circulating on the Internet that are either old, have nothing to do with this war, or their circumstances are distorted. One of such photos...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: The photo was posted on the group’s Instagram page and on the Facebook page of the group leader Serhil Filimonov on February 25. 
 Thus, the photo of people in military uniforms, which was spread on the Internet as evidence of the participation of Kyiv’s Dynamo football players in the war, which has no relation to the football club, shows that the people in it are members of the Ukrainian nationalist group “Gonor”.
